mapper.select: /*mapper.user.UserMapper.findByEmail */ SELECT email, nickname, password, provider_code, provider_id, profile_image_url, user_status_code, role_code, fcm_token, terms_agreed_yn, privacy_agreed_yn, terms_agreed_at AS termsAgreedAt, created_at AS createdAt, deleted_at AS deletedAt, last_login_at AS lastLoginAt FROM users WHERE email = #{email}
